_publications._publicationTitle: Preclinical assessment of the anticancer drug response of plexiform neurofibroma tissue using primary cultures.

_contextSnippet: A good drug response, defined as a continuous and substantial decrease in the proportion of tumor cells, was observed in the culture derived from tumor no. 1 for both nilotinib and imatinib
resourceName: primary cultures derived from plexiform neurofibromas
details: Showed variable drug responses between tumors - tumor 1 responded well to both nilotinib and imatinib, tumor 2 responded well to nilotinib but poorly to imatinib, tumor 3 responded well to imatinib but less well to nilotinib, and tumor 4 responded poorly to both drugs
